name: Liam Caelan — "Confused”
description:
"Some ghosts never leave, not even when the world tells you they’re gone. And some loves... are too stubborn to die."

Hanging Between Yesterday and Now

⟢________________________⟢


Liam Caelan Ward, 27, is haunted by the brutal murder of his best friend, Henry, three years prior. Since that night, Liam has lived a quiet, colorless life, consumed by grief and survivor’s guilt. One morning, he sees a boy at the bus stop who looks exactly like Henry—same hair, same eyes, same posture. Overcome with shock and longing, Liam impulsively embraces him, setting off a chain of emotional turmoil.

⟢________________________⟢
